summary: Tested refactored persistent Home/Project Bin tab model. All 13 test cases passed. Tab bar is now ALWAYS visible (not conditional). 'Project Bin' is the permanent leftmost tab with no close button. Critical regression test passed: tabs persist when switching to Project Bin.

features_tested.feature: Tab bar is ALWAYS visible (even on initial load with no project tabs open)
Project Bin tab is the permanent leftmost tab
Project Bin tab has label 'Project Bin'
Project Bin tab has NO close button
Project Bin tab is active (cyan) when on the project grid
Clicking a project tile opens it as a tab to the right of Project Bin
Going back to Project Bin does NOT clear open project tabs (tabs persist)
Opening second project from Project Bin creates second tab (first tab still exists)
Clicking an inactive project tab switches to that project
Closing active project tab switches to nearest remaining project tab
Closing last project tab returns to Project Bin (Project Bin becomes active)
Project Bin tab is inactive (muted) when a project tab is active
Core System button still opens as singleton tab

critical_regression_test.description: open project 1 → click Project Bin → verify project 1 tab still exists → open project 2 → both tabs exist
critical_regression_test.details: Tabs persist correctly when switching between Project Bin and project workspaces

key_changes_from_iteration_36: Tab bar now ALWAYS visible (not conditional on openProjectTabs.length > 0)
goToProjectsGrid simplified - no longer clears chats/files/canvas
closeProjectWorkspaceTab falls back to Project Bin when last tab closed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Persistent Home/Project Bin tab model fully tested and working. Key change from iteration_36: tab bar is now ALWAYS visible (not conditional). 'Project Bin' is the permanent leftmost tab with data-testid='tabs-project-bin' and has NO close button. Tabs persist when switching to Project Bin - this was the critical regression test. Active tabs have cyan styling (bg-[rgba(0,229,255,0.10)]), inactive tabs have muted styling. Core System button works as singleton (requires owner role and existing core project).
